lines.en: Hi there! Welcome in. Do you have an appointment?
lines.zh: 嗨！欢迎光临。您有预约吗？

lines.en: Yes, I booked a manicure for three o'clock.
lines.zh: 有的，我预约了三点的美甲。

lines.en: Great. Please choose a color from our collection.
lines.zh: 好的。请从我们的色板中选一个颜色。

lines.en: I'd like this soft pink. Can you add some glitter too?
lines.zh: 我想要这个浅粉色。能再加一些亮片吗？

lines.en: Of course. Would you like a French tip as well?
lines.zh: 当然可以。您还想做法式美甲吗？

lines.en: No, just the solid color with glitter is fine.
lines.zh: 不用了，纯色加亮片就好。

lines.en: Perfect. Please relax your hands. This won't take long.
lines.zh: 好的。请放松您的手。不会花很长时间的。

lines.en: How long does the polish usually last?
lines.zh: 指甲油通常能保持多久？

lines.en: About two weeks if you're careful. Here you go, all done!
lines.zh: 如果您小心的话大约两周。好了，完成了！

lines.en: They look beautiful! Thank you so much.
